mapper.select: select p.* from sys_post p left join sys_user_post up on up.post_id = p.post_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = up.user_id where u.user_id = #{userId}

select distinct u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time, sp.post_name, sd.dept_name, sup.is_primary as isPrimaryPost FROM sys_user u left join sys_user_post sup on sup.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = sup.post_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select distinct u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time, sp.post_name, sd.dept_name, sup.is_primary as isPrimaryPost FROM sys_user u left join sys_user_post sup on sup.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = sup.post_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
select sp.*,sd.dept_name from sys_post sp left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
select sp.*,sd.dept_name from sys_post sp left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
select sp.*, sup.is_primary, sd.dept_name from sys_post sp JOIN sys_user_post sup on sup.post_id = sp.post_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id where sup.user_id = #{userId}
